target_files: Option handling; RequestGroup; new libtorrent backend files

verification: `testLibtorrentSessionTracksActiveTorrent` proves active torrent handle tracking and per-torrent limit calls are safe. `testChangeOption` and the full RPC test group prove active option changes. `testStopsWhenSeedTimeElapsed`, `testStopsWhenShareRatioReached`, and `testKeepsSeedingWhenRatioDisabled` prove libtorrent seed policy semantics. `testLibtorrentAllDownloadFinishedUsesSeedingStatus` proves selected-file completion is not treated as full torrent seeding. Full `aria2_tests` passed with `OK (1148)`.
notes: BT complete hooks fire once before final completion; selected-file completion exits without waiting for full-torrent seed policy.
